project.name: smart-files
project.description: Monorepo file manager with NestJS backend, Vite + React web frontend, Expo mobile app, and Prisma shared schema.

layers.name: Infrastructure
layers.description: Deployment configurations, container definitions, and CI/CD pipelines.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Project documentation, README files, and development guides.

layers.name: Shared
layers.description: Shared Prisma schema, TypeScript types, i18n translations, and utilities used across all packages.

layers.name: Backend API
layers.description: NestJS REST API with authentication, file upload, folder management, and share endpoints.

layers.name: Web Frontend
layers.description: Vite + React SPA with Tailwind CSS providing the web file manager interface.

layers.name: Mobile App
layers.description: Expo React Native app providing the mobile file manager interface.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Package manifests, TypeScript configs, and environment templates.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and documentation to understand the project architecture, features, and deployment strategy.

tour.title: Infrastructure & Deployment
tour.description: Explore the containerization and CI/CD setup that powers production deployment.

tour.title: Shared Schema & Types
tour.description: Understand the Prisma database schema and shared TypeScript types that all packages depend on.

tour.title: Backend API Entry Point
tour.description: Trace how the NestJS application boots, configures Swagger, and wires modules together.

tour.title: Authentication Layer
tour.description: Explore JWT-based authentication with guards, strategies, and DTOs.

tour.title: Core Domain Services
tour.description: Dive into the file, folder, upload, and share services that implement the core business logic.

tour.title: Web Frontend
tour.description: Explore the Vite React SPA entry point, routing, API clients, and page components.

tour.title: Mobile App
tour.description: Understand the Expo React Native app structure, screens, and API integration.
